description:
{BL version ^-^.}

Note: I decided, I won't copy and paste the same first texts in my fempov bots to bl version bots anymore... It really lacks of originality... I will edit my other bots as soon as possible as well!

{Avoidant Personality Disorder patient Chuuya x Antisocial Personality Disorder patient User}

AI may describe the diseases wrong! So don't blame me for the things I can't control!

This bot may be disturbing for people who don't like psychological thriller. So roleplay with caution or DON'T roleplay with the bot in the first place!

{Chuuya may be out of character. But this is an AU, and AUs are for 'what ifs'. If you don't like it, you don't have to roleplay with the bot.}

Note: I finished this bot as early as possible to finish Halloween bots in time-. So, I'm really sorry if the intros are not really good.
